productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Women Renewal White Shoes
description: The adidas Renewal athletic shoe is a great everyday wear shoe that combines style with comfort. The go-to appeal of this pair has made it one of the most popular adidas shoes. Wear this for your morning jog, a walk in the park, and it also doubles as a lightweight casual sneaker! Upper Leather upper with synthetic overlays adidas 3-Stripe overlays at the mid-foot region Padded fabric inner Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Central lace-ups Padded tongue with branding Upper adhered to the outsole Outsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves and strategically placed rubber cleats Branding at the mid-foot area on the outsole Outsole adhered onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guard Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
